method: in-app browser (Chromium) rendered a11y_harness.html (real worker CSS incl. HERO_CSS + reduced-motion, representative lesson/reveal/grade markup).
conclusion: Acceptance: key tasks are keyboard/touch operable (native labelled buttons, focus moves into revealed content); evidence (原文 link) vs inference (讲义·推断 marker) is clearly distinguished; reduced-motion disables animation but restores the .fr/.bw content to opacity:1 (no function lost).
